revealed_facts: Cylinder 2 misfire code P0302 intermittently appears; likely failing ignition coil or early valve seat issue common to 3.6L Pentastar

review.review_text: Seller actively hid a significant prior front-end collision with frame damage and misrepresented the severity of a known engine misfire issue (P0302), claiming the car ran 'smooth as butter' when it did not.
revealed_facts: Vehicle was involved in moderate front-end collision in 2019; airbags did not deploy but frame was pulled and repaired at independent shop
